results.rendered_html:
śoṇita a. [śoṇ-itac] Red, purple, crimson.
— ṇaṃ
1 Blood; upasthitā śoṇitapāraṇā me  R. 2. 39 ;  Ve. 1. 21 ;  Mu. 1. 8. 
2 Saffron.
Comp.
— āhvayaṃ saffron.
— ukṣita a. bloodstained.
— upalaḥ a ruby.
— caṃdanaṃ red sandal.
— pa a. blood-sucking.
— pāraṇā a meal of blood or fleshmeat.
— puraṃ N. of the city of the demon Bāṇa.
